summary: Frontend-only validation of Golf in Mexico° copy + design sprint. All 11 review requirements PASS visually and functionally on desktop (1920) and mobile (390). No accented place-names (México/Cancún) found anywhere across Home, Contact, TripBuilder, Experience, Journal, Destinations, LosCabos, About, Footer, Nav. Logo visible on both dark (Home hero, LC hero — opacity 1, h-10 = 40px) and light (Contact, Journal, Destinations cream pages) backgrounds. Footer: 'weekly field notes' line removed, no 4,200 copy, social icons are 44x44 circles, Contact link points to /contact. Contact page renders H1 'Let's talk golf.', mailto and Google Calendar links work, iframe with Pablo's appointment schedule loads. TripBuilder hero H1 'A custom Mexico golf itinerary in 48 hours. On us.' with CTA 'Get My 48-Hour Proposal' and AVAILABILITY banner placed below CTA (dark green bg rgb(15,36,25), white uppercase text + gold dot). GIM Promise is a single combined section (no 3 cards) with correct heading, subhead, refund body, and Pablo/José signature. Step 1 destination descriptions all updated correctly. Experience cards have no small label/eyebrow, each CTA reads 'Start a {Name} proposal', blank-proposal copy updated. Journal: sticky filter bar at top, H1 'Four editorial pillars guide everything we publish.', 4 pillar cards visible, pillar-prev/pillar-next testids present, framed article cards, dark-green 'Get in touch' CTA with 'Connect with us →' linking to /contact. LosCabos: SectionNav anchors (#overview..#faq) exist; clicking Courses lands H2 at y=132 just below sticky nav. Keep exploring shows 5 cards including Unique Destinations, simple photo+name overlay. Mobile horizontal-scroll regression from iteration_1 is FIXED (scrollW=winW=390 on Home and Trip Builder).
critical_code_review_comments: LosCabos.jsx is 927 lines — exceeds 700-line guideline. Consider extracting sections (Hero, QuickFacts, Courses, Costs, Logistics, Season, FAQ, KeepExploring, NewsletterMiniForm, PlaybookEndForm) into separate components for maintainability.
Journal.jsx and TripBuilder.jsx are also large; consider splitting pillar slider and step components.
All forms (Trip Builder, Newsletter mini, Playbook End, Contact email) are explicitly mocked as expected per agent_to_agent_context_note — success states render correctly.

data-testid coverage is excellent: nav-logo, contact-email-link, contact-call-link, journal-filter-bar, pillar-prev, pillar-next, lc-keep-{slug}, lc-keep-exploring, hub section IDs (#overview..#faq) all present.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Site is fully frontend-mocked; no backend involvement. Use ?skipIntro=1 to bypass intro splash. Lenis smooth scroll requires ~1.5–2.2s wait after section-nav click for scroll to settle. Calendar iframe on /contact loads via calendar.google.com (external). All 11 review items verified; iteration_1's mobile horizontal-overflow on Home is now fixed (scrollW == winW == 390). No regressions observed across 6 pages tested.
rca of the issue: N/A — no issues to root-cause this iteration.
